## CLAUDE.md Review Gate

- [ ] I read and followed `CLAUDE.md`.
- [ ] I extended existing foundations instead of creating a parallel system.
- [ ] I evaluated analytics impact.
- [ ] I evaluated loading, empty, error, and retry states where relevant.
- [ ] I evaluated route, app-config, tutorial, and deep-link impact where relevant.
- [ ] I evaluated backward-compatibility and regression risk.
